creator: scootergrisen@gmail.com
text:
The last item in FreeBSD Installer Keymap Selection (il.kbd) shows as:
?~Y?~Q?

Also it messes up the graphics a bit when you go to the "?~Y?~Q?" item in the list. If the cursor is at the top of the list and i press End key to go to the bottom it says:
"?~Y?~Q?    opean"
Because the text that was previously showed "Central European" is not cleared.

"il" is country code for Israel i think.
